visual_description: A man in a white shirt and tie stands beside a television displaying a hallway surveillance feed, pointing at the screen. The camera then cuts to two men seated, one in a police uniform and another in a light blue shirt, both looking forward. Finally, a wide view shows the standing man addressing a group of men seated around a conference table in a glass-walled room.
audio_description: A man speaks while pointing at a TV screen. The audio then shows a quiet conversation among several men seated around a table.
